svg.title: ADAM // COMMAND CENTER — Amber Mainframe theme
svg.desc: A 1980s amber-phosphor mainframe dashboard on brown-black: giant counters for unread mail, markets and a project deadline, a spinning wireframe globe with a sweeping scan beam, two rotating tape reels, an ASCII boot banner, three station panels with live data, a life-admin grid, and a bottom ticker with marching crew sprites. Layered scanlines and a vignette overlay the whole CRT.
svg.text: ▸ BOOT OK · CORE 8/8 · MEM 640K · DISK 100% · NET LINK ESTABLISHED ▮▮
STATUS ▸ 201 UNREAD · 3 FLAGGED · NBIS -3.2 · WESTERN STATE T-38d · ALL AGENTS NOMINAL · DIGEST 06:00 SENT ▸ █
UPLINK ▸ SUPABASE OK · CRON OK · THEME: AMBER MAINFRAME · RENTON 06:04
